exact_spend_trigger: One direct public document from Eastern Finland Administrative Court, Internal Finland Police / police legal function, or a ministry/court-facing procedural guidance page that independently confirms the phenomenon or the official response.
if_trigger_met_publication_delta: Would create the cleanest Panel A upgrade by moving the Finland row toward independent institutional confirmation while also improving rare-language and cross-jurisdiction value.
if_trigger_not_met_hold_state: Keep Finland below official confirmation and do not spend another cycle on family-wide keyword churn.
paper_thesis_use: Gives Table 1E, reviewer-response prose, and thesis methods text one explicit rule for when Finland should reopen and when it should stay frozen.
visualization_dashboard_hook: Finland reopen-trigger badge ; authority-upgrade funnel ; jurisdiction-language caution overlay
caution: Do not treat route exhaustion as proof that no official Finnish record exists.

exact_spend_trigger: One direct SAGE correction, retraction, editor note, or publisher notice text from a genuinely different public surface than the already challenged DOI/PDF/XML landings.
if_trigger_met_publication_delta: Would create the cleanest non-Springer direct-notice upgrade in Panel B and weaken the sharpest current publisher-concentration objection.
if_trigger_not_met_hold_state: Keep SAGE at mediated-editor-statement class and preserve article-identity continuity without narrating final editorial action.
paper_thesis_use: Creates one machine-readable front door for the best publisher-diversification route once Finland stays frozen, helping future cycles avoid re-running the same challenged SAGE endpoints.
visualization_dashboard_hook: Publisher-diversity route card ; blocked-notice queue ; host-friction facet
caution: Do not restate the quoted editor statement as final journal action until a direct SAGE or publisher record is captured.

exact_spend_trigger: One direct NEJM notice text or equivalent public publisher-originating record, or a clearly changed host/network posture that makes a previously blocked public route meaningfully different.
if_trigger_met_publication_delta: Would produce the single largest blocked-to-direct jump in Panel B, but the path remains access-friction-heavy and should not displace SAGE unless the route genuinely changes.
if_trigger_not_met_hold_state: Keep NEJM at DOI-pair metadata class with exact host-friction evidence attached.
paper_thesis_use: Prevents low-yield replays of already blocked NEJM DOI/PDF routes while preserving the row as the strongest methods example of machine-readable corrective-action linkage without notice-text access.
visualization_dashboard_hook: Blocked-notice ladder ; DOI-linkage inset ; retrieval-feasibility legend
caution: Do not infer retraction reasoning or synthetic-image details beyond directly observed DOI metadata.

exact_spend_trigger: One direct platform, publisher, indexer, or institutional action record for a residual lead.
if_trigger_met_publication_delta: Would improve residual-bucket hygiene and limitations credibility, but changes the package less than Finland or one non-Springer direct notice.
if_trigger_not_met_hold_state: Keep the residual floor explicit and quarantined as useful negative evidence.
paper_thesis_use: Makes backlog-handling logic article-ready without pretending the residual bucket moves the top authority ceiling.
visualization_dashboard_hook: Residual-quarantine card ; source-depth floor panel ; blocked-source queue
caution: Do not infer sanctions, editorial findings, or full-network resolution from specialist reporting alone.

exact_spend_trigger: No new evidence needed; preserve the two Springer-originating direct-notice rows as solved benchmark/comparator surfaces and route effort elsewhere.
if_trigger_met_publication_delta: Locks in venue-type breadth without letting later cycles mistake same-family reinforcement for a new threshold event.
if_trigger_not_met_hold_state: Keep both rows stable and compare later routes against them instead of reopening the same publisher family.
paper_thesis_use: Gives manuscript, reviewer-response, and dashboard work one explicit solved-state reminder: venue-type breadth is closed, publisher diversity is not.
visualization_dashboard_hook: Venue-type comparison card ; publisher-concentration badge ; notice-depth funnel
